rationale: Section 16a was repealed Nov. 6, 2001, and contains no operative restriction on homestead exemption amounts. No conflict with proposed increase to Tax Code §11.13(b).
_note: Rule text is a repealed constitutional provision with no operative language. The governing constitutional authority for homestead exemptions likely resides in Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b or §1-j, not §16a. No conflict detected with repealed section.
